 {"id":"bd-2axv","title":"Implement run_parallel_agent_sweep()","description":"# Parallel Agent Sweep Implementation

## Parent Epic: bd-eta6 (Parallel Processing & Work Queue)

## Purpose
Process multiple repositories concurrently using work-stealing pattern.

## Implementation

```bash
run_parallel_agent_sweep() {
    local -n repos_ref=$1
    local parallel="$2"
    local with_release="$3"
    
    # Create work queue
    local work_queue=$(mktemp)
    local results_file="${RESULTS_FILE}"
    local lock_base="${AGENT_SWEEP_STATE_DIR}/locks"
    mkdir -p "$lock_base"
    
    printf "%s\n" "${repos_ref[@]}" > "$work_queue"
    
    # Spawn workers
    local pids=()
    for ((i=0; i<parallel; i++)); do
        (
            while true; do
                local repo_spec=""
                
                # Check global backoff first
                agent_sweep_backoff_wait_if_needed
                
                # Atomic dequeue
                if dir_lock_acquire "${lock_base}/queue.lock" 30; then
                    if [[ -s "$work_queue" ]]; then
                        repo_spec=$(head -1 "$work_queue")
                        tail -n +2 "$work_queue" > "${work_queue}.tmp"
                        mv "${work_queue}.tmp" "$work_queue"
                    fi
                    dir_lock_release "${lock_base}/queue.lock"
                fi
                
                [[ -z "$repo_spec" ]] && break
                
                # Process repo
                local repo_name repo_path session_name
                repo_name=$(basename "$repo_spec" | sed "s/@.*//")
                repo_path=$(repo_spec_to_path "$repo_spec")
                session_name="ru_sweep_${repo_name//[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/_}_${$}_${i}"
                
                run_single_agent_workflow "$session_name" "$repo_path" "$with_release"
            done
        ) &
        pids+=($\!)
    done
    
    # Wait for all workers
    local exit_code=0
    for pid in "${pids[@]}"; do
        wait "$pid" || exit_code=1
    done
    
    rm -f "$work_queue"
    return $exit_code
}
```

## Lock Points

| Lock | Purpose | Timeout |
|------|---------|---------|
| queue.lock | Atomic dequeue | 30s |
| results.lock | Atomic result append | 30s |
| backoff.lock | Global rate limit | 10s |

## Session Naming
ru_sweep_{repo_name}_{pid}_{worker_index}
Prevents collisions between parallel workers.

## ntm Serialization
Each repo has its own session, so no cross-repo serialization needed.
Within a session, robot commands must be sequential.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-06T21:54:43.670038293Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-07T04:39:15.959700975Z","closed_at":"2026-01-07T04:39:15.959700975Z","close_reason":"Implemented parallel agent sweep with work-stealing pattern, atomic queue operations via dir_lock, backoff support, and proper cleanup","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2axv","depends_on_id":"bd-7v3i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T21:58:52.830664822Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2axv","depends_on_id":"bd-b00c","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T21:58:52.782084950Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2axv","depends_on_id":"bd-hkmt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T21:58:52.810401672Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2axv","depends_on_id":"bd-wsef","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T22:38:02.081557268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2axv","depends_on_id":"bd-yrod","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T22:55:16.068178149Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-2qmu","title":"Set up GoReleaser for slb","description":"# Set up GoReleaser for slb (Simultaneous Launch Button)

## Prerequisites

- Audit task (bd-n16r) must be completed first
- This task only applies if audit determines slb lacks GoReleaser

## Overview

Configure GoReleaser for slb to enable automated multi-platform releases.

## Implementation

Standard GoReleaser setup:
- Targets: macOS (Intel/ARM), Linux (x64/ARM64), Windows (x64)
- Static binaries
- SHA256 checksums

## Two-Person Rule Considerations

slb implements two-person authentication. During setup:
- Understand communication mechanism (network? file-based?)
- Ensure builds work in offline mode if needed
- Test two-person flow works with released binaries

## Release Workflow

1. Create .goreleaser.yaml
2. Create .github/workflows/release.yml
3. Add repository_dispatch for both taps
4. Test release and two-person functionality

## Success Criteria

- [ ] GoReleaser config committed
- [ ] Release workflow committed
- [ ] Test release successful
- [ ] Two-person rule works with released binaries","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-14T03:27:12.894095550Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-14T04:15:14.898467889Z","closed_at":"2026-01-14T04:15:14.898467889Z","close_reason":"GoReleaser already fully configured in .goreleaser.yaml with multi-platform builds, Homebrew brews, Scoop scoops, nfpms, SBOM, and cosign signing. Just added HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN secret. Next release will publish to homebrew-tap and scoop-bucket.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qmu","depends_on_id":"bd-n16r","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-14T03:29:43.448313878Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2qmu","depends_on_id":"bd-yv06","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-14T03:54:22.430228690Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
